2606.29961.title: DuoMem: Towards Capable On-Device Memory Agents via Dual-Space Distillation
2606.29961.paper_summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents can solve complex procedural tasks by interacting with environments over multiple turns, but this ability typically depends on large models, long contexts, and repeated inference calls. This makes advanced memory-augmented agents difficult to deploy on resource-constrained devices. We introduce DuoMem, a dual-space distillation framework that transfers procedural problem-solving ability from a large teacher model to compact student models. DuoMem distils in two complementary spaces: (1)context-space distillation, which replaces student-generated memories with higher-quality teacher-generated procedural memories prepended to the student's input, and (2)parameter-space distillation, which fine-tunes lightweight LoRA adapters on successful teacher trajectories. Evaluated on ALFWorld, a challenging embodied decision-making benchmark, DuoMem boosts a 4B-parameter model from 4.3% to 77.9% task success rate, closing most of the gap to a 72B teacher model (87.1%), while adding fewer than 10M trainable parameters and only a few megabytes of pre-computed teacher memories. Moreover, the DuoMem-enhanced 4B model completes tasks over 3x faster than the 72B teacher in wall-clock time, making it viable for real-time edge deployment, which would be challenging for the teacher.Extensive ablations across eight models spanning 2B-72B parameters reveal that both distillation axes contribute complementary
2606.29961.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）基礎的代理可以通過在多個回合中與環境互動來解決複雜的程序性任務，但這種能力通常依賴於大型模型、長上下文和重複的推理調用。這使得在資源受限的設備上部署先進的記憶增強代理變得困難。我們介紹了DuoMem，一種雙空間蒸餾框架，將程序性問題解決能力從大型教師模型轉移到緊湊的學生模型。DuoMem在兩個互補的空間中進行蒸餾：（1）上下文空間蒸餾，將學生生成的記憶替換為更高質量的教師生成的程序性記憶，並將其附加到學生的輸入前面，以及（2）參數空間蒸餾，對成功的教師軌跡進行輕量級LoRA適配器的微調。在ALFWorld這個具有挑戰性的具身決策基準上進行評估，DuoMem將一個4B參數模型的任務成功率從4.3%提升到77.9%，縮小了與72B教師模型（87.1%）之間的大部分差距，同時增加的可訓練參數少於10M，並且只有幾MB的預計算教師記憶。此外，DuoMem增強的4B模型在牆鐘時間上完成任務的速度比72B教師快超過3倍，使其適合實時邊緣部署，這對教師來說將是具有挑戰性的。對跨越2B-72B參數的八個模型進行的廣泛消融實驗顯示，兩個蒸餾軸都對互補性做出了貢獻。
2606.29961.author: Peyman Hosseini et.al.
2606.29961.authors: Peyman Hosseini, Ondrej Bohdal, Ahmed Alajrami, Andrea Maracani, Ignacio Castro, Matthew Purver, Mete Ozay, Savas Ozkan, Taha Ceritli
